placeholders.businessName: Enter business name or your full name

form_errors.minLength: {{name}} must be at least {{min}} characters long.

sign_in.title: Log in
sign_in.description: Welcome back! Please enter your details.

sign_up.title: Sign up
sign_up.description: Manage queues easily and let people explore your business online

verify_signup.title: Verify your phone
verify_signup.description: We’ll send you a 5-digit code via our Telegram bot.
verify_signup.success_message: Welcome to Xizmat. Your account has been created successfully.

forgot_password.title: Forgot Password?
forgot_password.success_message: Reset password code is sent successfully.
forgot_password.description: No worries, we'll send you reset instructions.

graphql_errors.invalidToken: Session expired. Please log in again.
graphql_errors.bookingTimeOverlaps: This booking overlaps with an existing appointment.
graphql_errors.signInAsProviderRequiresProviderAccount: You need a service provider account to log in. If you already have a customer account, enter customer app and become a provider.

logo.title: Logo
logo.description: Your logo will appear where your business is presented on Xizmat. (Recommended at least 98 x 98)

thumbnail.title: Banner image
thumbnail.description: This image will appear across the top of your business profile.

images.title: Images of your works
images.description: These images will appear in the gallery of your business.

categories.title: Categories
categories.description: Select categories that best describes your business.

address.title: Address
address.coords_title: Select business location on the map
address.autocomplete_helper_text: Address will be filled automatically after you set your location on the map below.
address.map_web_hint: Choose a location on the map in the iOS or Android app; web preview does not include the map.

businesses_list.title: Choose business
businesses_list.description: Select one of your businesses to start working.
businesses_list.load_error: Could not check your businesses. Try again.

no_business.title: No business yet
no_business.description: You do not have any business to work with, create a new business.

profile.row_theme_subtitle: Use dark appearance for the app
profile.sign_out_confirm_message: You will need to sign in again to use the app as a provider.
profile.load_error: We could not load your business. Try again.
profile.placeholder_body: More information will appear here soon.
profile.how_payments_load_error: Could not load the current fee. Please try again later.
profile.how_payments_sec_billing_body: At the end of each month, we automatically generate a payment for that same calendar month. The amount is based on how many bookings you received through the app that month (the ones that count toward your bill). For example, if you used the app in April, your charge at month end reflects April’s bookings only — not the month you pay the invoice.
profile.how_payments_fee_subtitle: This rate applies to the service price on each qualifying booking.
profile.how_payments_step_1: We take the service price on each qualifying booking.
profile.how_payments_step_2: We only sum bookings for the month currently being billed.
profile.how_payments_step_3: We multiply that total by your platform commission rate.
profile.how_payments_status_lead: Only bookings that represent genuine customer visits:
profile.how_payments_note_trial: The month your first business was created may count as a trial with no platform charge for that month.
profile.how_payments_note_deadline: Every invoice shows a due date — pay on time to stay in good standing. Late payment may affect your account status and reminders.

business_details.delete_message: This cannot be undone. You can create a new business or choose another one from your list.

edit_business.unsaved_message: You have unsaved changes. Leave without saving?

queues.search_a11y_hint: Search by booking number, customer name, or phone number

empty.title: No bookings in queue
empty.description: When customers book you, they will appear here. You can also add a booking manually.

cancel.why: Why do you want to decline?
cancel.title: Are you sure you want to cancel?
cancel.description: If you decline now, the customer might not be able to book again for that time.

add_modal.title: Add booking manually
add_modal.success_message: Booking successfully added to the queue.
add_modal.date_time_warning: Select date and time to add this booking to the queue.

empty.title: No time available this day
empty.description: There’s no available time slots this day. Please inform customer or try pressing refresh button.

service_info.delete_message: This action cannot be undone. Customers will no longer see this service.
service_info.unsaved_message: You have unsaved changes. Leave without saving?
service_info.load_error: We could not load this service. Go back and try again.

general.title: General Information
general.title_helper_text: The service title is pre-filled from its category name — edit it below if you'd like something more specific.

primary_image.title: Primary image
primary_image.description: Primary image will appear where this service is presented on Xizmat.

images.title: Images of this service
images.description: These images will appear in the service info.

category.title: Category
category.description: Select category that best describes this service.
